2023-24 North Dakota Fighting Hawks Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 18-14 (10-6, 2nd in Summit MBB)

Coach: Paul Sather

PS/G: 75.2 (125th of 362)

PA/G: 71.9 (179th of 362)

SRS: -6.24 (248th of 362)

SOS: -6.10 (311th of 362)

ORtg: 110.4 (84th of 362)

DRtg: 105.4 (228th of 362)
